subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having quickened them that are nigh unto Thee through the sweet savors of Thy oneness and drawn them unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما بعثت المقربین من نفحات احدیتک و اجتذبتهم
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @entry by troops, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
